purpose: Seed corpus of gold-standard example sites for the AI website builder RAG system. Retrieve by category/style, inject as few-shot exemplars, or mine for design-token bundles and copy.

items.voice: Warm, sensory, and unhurried — a neighborhood baker who talks about flour, fire, and the four o'clock hour like they matter, because they do.
items.paletteMood: Stone-ground cream, terracotta crust, and deep cocoa crumb — the exact colors of a loaf pulled at dawn.
items.structureNotes: Deliberately breaks the generic hero->services->testimonials->cta template: a full-screen atmospheric hero opens into the baker's origin story (aboutImageText) before any selling, a menu block stands in for a services grid to foreground the actual bakes, a single essay-variant featuredQuote replaces a testimonials grid with one regular's love letter, and a morning-bake gallery precedes the visit/contact close.
items.embedText: bakery | food | warm-editorial-craft | Ember & Rye | Warm, sensory, and unhurried — a neighborhood baker who talks about flour, fire, and the four o'clock hour like they matter, because they do. | warm, sensory, hand-made, unhurried, specific | bakery patisserie sourdough food warm-editorial craft artisan neighborhood cream-terracotta-cocoa fraunces-karla sensory wood-fired | Deliberately breaks the generic hero->services->testimonials->cta template: a full-screen atmospheric hero opens into the baker's origin story (aboutImageText) before any selling, a menu block stands in for a services grid to foreground the actual bakes, a single essay-variant featuredQuote replaces a testimonials grid with one regular's love letter, and a morning-bake gallery precedes the visit/contact close.

items.voice: Bold, direct, second-person coaching that treats every session like the clock is running and you're the athlete.
items.paletteMood: Blacked-out gym floor under a single neon-lime work light: heavy charcoal, one electric accent, nothing soft.
items.structureNotes: Home deliberately front-loads a palette:primary stats banner immediately after the hero to establish authority through numbers before selling programs, and inserts a tabBar nav strip mid-page instead of ending on the generic services->testimonials->cta flow, giving the dense energetic pacing the brief asked for.
items.embedText: fitness | booking | energetic-dark-neon | IRONLINE Strength Club | Bold, direct, second-person coaching that treats every session like the clock is running and you're the athlete. | bold, motivating, direct, second-person, high-momentum | fitness gym boutique-fitness strength-training conditioning booking dark-neon energetic brooklyn second-person high-intensity membership | Home deliberately front-loads a palette:primary stats banner immediately after the hero to establish authority through numbers before selling programs, and inserts a tabBar nav strip mid-page instead of ending on the generic services->testimonials->cta flow, giving the dense energetic pacing the brief asked for.

items.voice: Warm, plain-spoken, and unflinchingly concrete — a neighbor telling you exactly where the money went and who it reached.
items.paletteMood: Warm oat-paper white sections, a deep hopeful-teal spine in headings and the impact stats banner, and a coral heartbeat reserved for the donate CTAs — soft, human, and quietly optimistic.
items.structureNotes: Deliberately leads hero -> mission (aboutImageText) -> impact stats -> a single beneficiary essay quote -> programs -> donate CTA, front-loading human story and proof-of-impact before ever listing programs, which inverts the generic hero->services->testimonials->cta template that sells before it earns trust.
items.embedText: nonprofit | nonprofit | story-first hopeful editorial | The Riverbend Neighbors Fund | Warm, plain-spoken, and unflinchingly concrete — a neighbor telling you exactly where the money went and who it reached. | hopeful, human, mission-driven, plain-spoken, concrete | nonprofit community-foundation charity donation grants mutual-aid story-first hopeful-editorial warm-teal-coral mission-driven local | Deliberately leads hero -> mission (aboutImageText) -> impact stats -> a single beneficiary essay quote -> programs -> donate CTA, front-loading human story and proof-of-impact before ever listing programs, which inverts the generic hero->services->testimonials->cta template that sells before it earns trust.

items.voice: Precise, understated, and quietly authoritative — the counsel of a firm that lets its record speak and never oversells.
items.paletteMood: Ink navy and muted gold on warm off-white — a lawyer's oak-panelled restraint, not a startup's neon.
items.structureNotes: Home deliberately leads minimal-hero -> credibility stats -> practice-areas grid -> named team -> a single general-counsel client quote -> consultation CTA, deferring social proof behind capability and people because a boutique firm sells partner access and record, not a wall of testimonials in the generic hero->services->testimonials->cta order.
items.embedText: legal | services | quiet-luxury | Halstead & Roe | Precise, understated, and quietly authoritative — the counsel of a firm that lets its record speak and never oversells. | precise, authoritative, understated, no-hype, patrician | legal law-firm corporate-law boutique quiet-luxury professional-services toronto m-and-a authority services faq team stats | Home deliberately leads minimal-hero -> credibility stats -> practice-areas grid -> named team -> a single general-counsel client quote -> consultation CTA, deferring social proof behind capability and people because a boutique firm sells partner access and record, not a wall of testimonials in the generic hero->services->testimonials->cta order.

items.voice: Playful, punchy, and confident — coffee-nerdy enough to name the varietal, friendly enough to hand you a cup and skip the lecture.
items.paletteMood: Warm cream paper, a shot of burnt-orange energy, and near-black ink — a 1970s diner menu that learned to pull a killer espresso.
items.structureNotes: Home deliberately breaks the generic hero->services->testimonials->cta pattern by leading with a punchy centered hero, then a stats banner and tabBar 'roast board' moment, then product-first commerce (productGrid) before any narrative, pushing servicesGrid, a single featuredQuote, deliveryLinks, testimonials, and faq below the fold to keep the beans front and center.
items.embedText: coffee | food | bold-retro | Third Gear Coffee Roasters | Playful, punchy, and confident — coffee-nerdy enough to name the varietal, friendly enough to hand you a cup and skip the lecture. | playful, punchy, confident, coffee-nerdy, friendly | coffee roaster cafe ecommerce subscription bold-retro high-contrast playful food products single-origin | Home deliberately breaks the generic hero->services->testimonials->cta pattern by leading with a punchy centered hero, then a stats banner and tabBar 'roast board' moment, then product-first commerce (productGrid) before any narrative, pushing servicesGrid, a single featuredQuote, deliveryLinks, testimonials, and faq below the fold to keep the beans front and center.

items.voice: Warm, ingredient-forward, and story-rich — the tone of a farmer-friend telling you where tonight's dinner grew.
items.paletteMood: Warm oat linen, deep forest shade, and fire-roasted rust — a candlelit barn supper at harvest.
items.structureNotes: Opens on a full-bleed image hero under a transparent overlay header, then leads with sourcing (aboutImageText) and the living menu before any social proof — deferring testimonials/stats and placing an essay-variant chef quote at the emotional center, deliberately breaking the generic hero->services->testimonials->cta order to foreground provenance and story.
items.embedText: restaurant | food | rustic-warm-atmospheric | The Hollow & Hearth | Warm, ingredient-forward, and story-rich — the tone of a farmer-friend telling you where tonight's dinner grew. | warm, seasonal, ingredient-forward, story-rich, rustic | restaurant farm-to-table seasonal rustic-warm atmospheric asheville menu chef-driven food | Opens on a full-bleed image hero under a transparent overlay header, then leads with sourcing (aboutImageText) and the living menu before any social proof — deferring testimonials/stats and placing an essay-variant chef quote at the emotional center, deliberately breaking the generic hero->services->testimonials->cta order to foreground provenance and story.

items.voice: Elegant and intimate, speaking to the hand of the maker and the weight of the metal — refined but never cold.
items.paletteMood: Warm blush and soft gold against deep charcoal — a jeweler's bench at golden hour.
items.structureNotes: Leads product-forward (minimal hero straight into productGrid) rather than services-first, then earns trust through the maker's story, a single owner quote, and in-wear gallery before any social proof — inverting the generic hero->services->testimonials->cta template for an e-commerce jewelry brand where the objects and the hand behind them carry the pitch.
items.embedText: handmade | products | quiet-luxury | Alder & Ore | Elegant and intimate, speaking to the hand of the maker and the weight of the metal — refined but never cold. | elegant, intimate, refined, materials-focused, artisanal | handmade jewelry e-commerce products quiet-luxury goldsmith minimal blush-and-gold made-to-order sustainable providence | Leads product-forward (minimal hero straight into productGrid) rather than services-first, then earns trust through the maker's story, a single owner quote, and in-wear gallery before any social proof — inverting the generic hero->services->testimonials->cta template for an e-commerce jewelry brand where the objects and the hand behind them carry the pitch.

items.voice: Dependable, craftsmanly, and quietly proud — a family-run crew that talks about soil, seasons, and stonework the way a good neighbor would.
items.paletteMood: Weathered stone and deep evergreen with warm bark undertones — grounded, seasonal, and unhurried.
items.structureNotes: Home leads with an image-forward split hero straight into a before/after gallery to prove craft before pitching services, then servicesGrid, a process timeline, banner stats, exactly one featuredQuote, and a closing estimate CTA — deliberately front-loading visual proof and process over the generic hero->services->testimonials->cta order.
items.embedText: landscaping | services | natural-earthy-trust | Cedar & Slate Landscapes | Dependable, craftsmanly, and quietly proud — a family-run crew that talks about soil, seasons, and stonework the way a good neighbor would. | dependable, craftsmanly, local, seasons-aware, unhurried | landscaping garden-design hardscaping maintenance residential earthy natural trust seasonal local-services fraser-valley before-after-gallery free-estimate | Home leads with an image-forward split hero straight into a before/after gallery to prove craft before pitching services, then servicesGrid, a process timeline, banner stats, exactly one featuredQuote, and a closing estimate CTA — deliberately front-loading visual proof and process over the generic hero->services->testimonials->cta order.

items.voice: Reassuring, plain-spoken, and warm — a family dentist that explains everything before it touches your teeth.
items.paletteMood: Crisp clinical white grounded by a calm medical blue, softened with a spa-like mint that keeps the space feeling gentle rather than sterile.
items.structureNotes: Deviates from the generic hero->services->testimonials->cta template by leading with a trust-first featuresList (same-day, gentle, insurance) before any service list and inserting a primary-banner stats proof block between services and testimonials, so a nervous patient sees reasons to trust the clinic before being sold treatments.
items.embedText: dental | booking | clean-clinical-trust | Riverbend Family Dental | Reassuring, plain-spoken, and warm — a family dentist that explains everything before it touches your teeth. | reassuring, professional, warm, plain-spoken | dental family-dentist booking healthcare clean-clinical medical-blue mint trust-first same-day-emergency invisalign kitchener | Deviates from the generic hero->services->testimonials->cta template by leading with a trust-first featuresList (same-day, gentle, insurance) before any service list and inserting a primary-banner stats proof block between services and testimonials, so a nervous patient sees reasons to trust the clinic before being sold treatments.

items.voice: Hushed, exacting, and warm — a photographer who talks about light and quiet moments rather than packages and deliverables.
items.paletteMood: Near-black gallery walls, warm bone-white light, and a single restrained thread of muted gold.
items.tone: minimal, evocative, quietly confident, warm, editorial
items.structureNotes: The home page deliberately opens on a chrome-free fullImage hero and leads with images (gallery -> single minimal quote -> short about -> inquiry), skipping the generic services/testimonials/CTA stack so the work breathes; all commercial depth (stats, services, testimonials, pricing, FAQ) is pushed to the portfolio and inquire pages where a serious couple goes to decide.
items.embedText: photographer | portfolio | quiet-luxury dark gallery | Marlow & Fen | Hushed, exacting, and warm — a photographer who talks about light and quiet moments rather than packages and deliverables. | minimal, evocative, quietly confident, warm, editorial | photographer wedding fine-art portfolio dark-mode gallery film-photography quiet-luxury hudson-valley editorial image-led minimal | The home page deliberately opens on a chrome-free fullImage hero and leads with images (gallery -> single minimal quote -> short about -> inquiry), skipping the generic services/testimonials/CTA stack so the work breathes; all commercial depth (stats, services, testimonials, pricing, FAQ) is pushed to the portfolio and inquire pages where a serious couple goes to decide.

items.voice: Crisp, technical, and precise — a product-analytics company that talks in real numbers and never pads a sentence.
items.paletteMood: Slate ink on cool paper, cut through with one confident electric-indigo signal — engineering-grade calm, zero decoration.
items.structureNotes: Deliberately leads with a split product-framing hero into a customer logoCloud and a deep featuresList before any social proof, then routes funnel-of-belief through stats -> pricing -> faq -> cta — front-loading capability and hard numbers instead of the generic hero->services->testimonials->cta order, which suits a technical B2B buyer who wants proof before pitch.
items.embedText: saas | services | sharp-modern-structured | Cardinal | Crisp, technical, and precise — a product-analytics company that talks in real numbers and never pads a sentence. | crisp, technical, precise, no-fluff, engineering-grade | saas product-analytics b2b developer-tools sharp-modern slate-indigo usage-based-pricing structured technical | Deliberately leads with a split product-framing hero into a customer logoCloud and a deep featuresList before any social proof, then routes funnel-of-belief through stats -> pricing -> faq -> cta — front-loading capability and hard numbers instead of the generic hero->services->testimonials->cta order, which suits a technical B2B buyer who wants proof before pitch.

items.voice: Calm, grounded, and unpretentious — a neighborhood studio that speaks like a knowing friend, never a wellness brand shouting about transformation.
items.paletteMood: Sun-warmed sage and oat-cream with a whisper of clay pink — like linen curtains and a potted fern in morning light.
items.structureNotes: The home page leads split hero into a philosophy aboutImageText and class servicesGrid before any social proof, so the studio's ethos and offering land first; testimonials and CTA close rather than open, and pricing/booking/faq are split across dedicated classes and book pages — deliberately avoiding the generic hero->services->testimonials->cta single-page pattern.
items.embedText: wellness | booking | soft-botanical-calm | Fernrow Yoga | Calm, grounded, and unpretentious — a neighborhood studio that speaks like a knowing friend, never a wellness brand shouting about transformation. | calm, grounded, welcoming, unpretentious, warm | wellness yoga studio booking botanical calm sage vancouver prenatal restorative membership neighborhood | The home page leads split hero into a philosophy aboutImageText and class servicesGrid before any social proof, so the studio's ethos and offering land first; testimonials and CTA close rather than open, and pricing/booking/faq are split across dedicated classes and book pages — deliberately avoiding the generic hero->services->testimonials->cta single-page pattern.
